notes: Monthly data from 2000-2025 covering UK electricity generation, demand, and prices
Generation mix from GOV.UK historical data with seasonal adjustments
Coal/gas split estimated based on historical phase-out timeline
Wind/solar split estimated based on capacity deployment data
Carbon intensity calculated from generation mix using IPCC emission factors
Grid health index (0-100): renewable score + low-carbon score + coal phase-out score
Wholesale price estimates based on market data (actual prices vary by contract)
Notable events annotated in notes field

monthly_data.notes: First coal-free hour since Industrial Revolution
Energy crisis begins - gas prices surge
Last UK coal power station (Ratcliffe) closes
UK becomes first major economy to end coal power
